name: tw-atlassian
description: Atlassian MCP integration for the TechWave toolkit. Connects Jira and Confluence to the tw-dev orchestrator — install this plugin if you want /orchestrator to auto-fetch Jira tickets. Uses OAuth browser authentication; no API tokens needed.

atlassian.description: Atlassian Remote MCP — Jira ticket fetch, JQL search, Confluence page fetch. Authenticates via browser OAuth — no API token or environment variables needed.
